case_title: S & C MOTORS INC. VS BRAGA, HOLBERT CARDOSO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRAGA, HOLBERT CARDOSO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY S & C MOTORS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BRAGA, HOLBERT CARDOSO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-30-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S & C MOTORS INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRAGA, HOLBERT CARDOSO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,570.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO HOLBERT CARDOSO BRAGA RETURNED--NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED
